meaning: adj.(英国电影导演、悬念大师)希区柯克(Sir Alfred)
examples: The Hitchcockian terror of the plummeting corpses was quickly replaced by health fears.
Its mix of meta-awareness and Hitchcockian suspense make Alan Wake a unique and fun experiment and one of the best games of the year.
He USES the omnipotent viewpoint of the photographer to present an image that feels like a panorama but has a heightened Hitchcockian suspense to it.
The 2013 NCAA men's basketball tournament, in true Hitchcockian form, has been overrun by vicious birds.
Similarly, Winslow might bring down on you a Hitchcockian swarm of Eagles.
